_comment: Strategy.Operations verbs. Trivial passthroughs to OperationsManager (reached via StrategyState.Get().Operations) and to Operation methods (receiver "self"). List-returning reads (GetAvailableOperations, GetPreviousOperationResults, Operation.GetMissions) are bespoke and live in Strategy/Operations.cs.

verbs.name: Current
verbs.summary: The campaign's currently selected operation, or null.

verbs.name: Previous
verbs.summary: The campaign's most recently finished operation, or null.

verbs.name: ByIndex
verbs.summary: The available operation at the given index, or null.

verbs.name: StoryAvailable
verbs.summary: Whether a story operation is currently available.

verbs.name: EnemyFactionAvailable
verbs.summary: Whether an operation against the given enemy faction is available.

verbs.name: IsActive
verbs.summary: Whether an operation of the given template is currently active.

verbs.name: FinishedCount
verbs.summary: How many operations have finished against the given faction type.

verbs.name: FinishedCountWithResult
verbs.summary: How many operations have finished against the given faction type with the given status.

verbs.name: AvailableOfClient
verbs.summary: How many operations of the given client faction are available, filtered by operation type.

verbs.name: SetCurrent
verbs.summary: Select the given operation as the campaign's current operation.

verbs.name: Finish
verbs.summary: Run the game's operation-finished handling for the given operation.

verbs.name: Template
verbs.summary: The operation's template.

verbs.name: Result
verbs.summary: The operation's result.

verbs.name: CurrentMission
verbs.summary: The operation's current mission, or null.

verbs.name: PreviousMission
verbs.summary: The operation's previous mission, or null.

verbs.name: Name
verbs.summary: The operation's translated display name.

verbs.name: Description
verbs.summary: The operation's translated description.

verbs.name: Type
verbs.summary: The operation's type.

verbs.name: RemainingTime
verbs.summary: The operation's remaining time before it times out.

verbs.name: Length
verbs.summary: The operation's length.

verbs.name: Seed
verbs.summary: The operation's generation seed.

verbs.name: CanTimeOut
verbs.summary: Whether the operation can time out.

verbs.name: Planet
verbs.summary: The operation's planet template.

verbs.name: ClientFaction
verbs.summary: The operation's client (story) faction template.

verbs.name: EnemyFaction
verbs.summary: The operation's enemy faction template.
